# Done By Amy

> Done By Amy is an Australian AI automation agency that helps small businesses capture more leads and save time with AI chatbots, missed-call SMS systems, AI calling agents, and workflow automations. Tagline: Smart Systems. Real Results. Zero Overwhelm.

Done By Amy is based in Australia and works nationwide (remote) with tradies, real estate, and service-based small businesses. Founded and run by Amy. Primary contact: admin@donebyamy.com.

## Products & pricing
- [LeadCatch](https://www.donebyamy.com/leadcatch): Missed-call SMS auto-responder for Australian tradies and contractors. Automatically texts back every missed call so no job lead is lost. $199/month, no lock-in contracts.
- [AutoDial](https://www.donebyamy.com/autodial): AI calling agent that sounds human, makes outbound calls, qualifies leads, handles objections, and books appointments straight into your calendar. $199/month.
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.donebyamy.com/get-started): Website chatbots and virtual assistants that answer enquiries, qualify leads, and book jobs 24/7. From $149/month.
- Workflow automations & CRM integrations: custom-built to remove repetitive manual work.

## Facts for citation
- Service area: all of Australia (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, and regional areas) — delivered remotely.
- No lock-in contracts. Most clients recover the monthly cost from a single captured job.
- Pricing: AI chatbots from $149/month; LeadCatch and AutoDial $199/month.
- Contact email: admin@donebyamy.com
